GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL needs help reviewing or closing unresolved, unsolicited scientific inquiries logged by HCPs.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
### Inquiry Queue – Open Items as of <today’s date>. Would you like to manage an inquiry?
• **Open 14 Jul 2025 – Dose tapering beyond 12 months** (Rheumatology) – 12 days outstanding • **Open 18 Jul 2025 – IL-8 biomarker utility** (Oncology) – 8 days outstanding • **Open 22 Jul 2025 – Comparative immunogenicity** (Community Pharmacy) – 4 days outstanding
Actions: **Respond** | **Delegate** | **Escalate to MI Team**

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Keywords: inquiry, question, MI request, unresolved, scientific question, risposta, richiesta.
🚫 Out of scope • Sales / pricing queries, payer or formulary issues, sample requests, adverse-event reporting.
